prompt: Hero is on the button with KJo and everyone folded so far. Which simple action fits best when position is clearly in your favor?
why_v1: On the button in a clean first-in spot, a playable broadway hand should still raise.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. On the button with KJo and no prior open, position turns this into a clean first-in raise rather than a passive or fearful response.
